snp2.6:1.1: Living the Dhamma life, living the holy life:
snp2.6:1.2: This, they say, is the highest power.
snp2.6:2.2: delighting in injury, a stupid beast,
snp2.6:3.4: even when proclaimed by the Awakened One.
snp2.6:4.4: to be the path that leads to hell.
snp2.6:5.2: from womb to womb, from darkness to darkness,
snp2.6:5.3: a monk of this sort, after death,
snp2.6:6.1: Just like a cesspit, full, used for many years,
snp2.6:7.1: Monks, whoever you know to be like this,
snp2.6:7.3: evil in his desires, evil in his resolves,
snp2.6:8.1: all of you, united, shun him.
snp2.6:9.3: Having swept away those of evil desires, evil
snp2.6:10.4: you will put an end to suffering & stress.
